title: Clay's Ark
author: Octavia E. Butler
description: A powerful story of survival in unprecedented times, from the award-winning author of Parable of the Sower. In an alternate America marked by volatile class warfare, Blake Maslin is traveling with his teenage twin daughters when their car is ambushed. Their attackers appear sickly yet possess inhuman strength, and they transport Blake's family to an isolated compound. There, the three captives discover that the compound's residents have a highly contagious alien disease that has mutated their DN...
subjects: Fiction, african american & black, mystery & detective
subject_facet: Fiction, african american & black, mystery & detective
